communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Military service records for subject below;
Name: Charles Prouty
Branch: United States Navy
DOB - 04/11/1945
Dates of Service: Approx 1965 to 1973

Request following documents;
1) copy of Silver Star Medal award citation
2) copy of Bronze Star Medal award citation
3) copy of Navy commendation medal award citations
4) Presidential Unit Citation award citation certificate 
5)  Awards, date of discharge 

ST-1
Redact per 5 U.S.C. § 552(b)(6).
I request hard copies of paperwork in the file showing this information.
Please mail hardcopies to:
MUCKROCK NEWS
263 HUNTINGTON AVE
BOSTON, MA 02115
or please email pdf copies to requests@muckrock.com

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eric Bradley

title: Axon and Fusus Contracts | Q2 2026 | DeKalb County Department of Purchasing and Contracting

communications.subject: Georgia Open Records Act Request: Axon and Fusus Contracts | Q2 2026 | DeKalb County Department of Purchasing and Contracting
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All contracts, licenses, MOUs, MOAs, data agreements, letters of intent, State of Work documents, Scope of Work documents, and other agreement documents with Axon and Fusus that were active any time between 1/1/2025 and the date this request is fulfilled.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

a

communications.subject: New Jersey Open Public Records Act Request: Financial aid optimization contracts
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the New Jersey Open Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting a copy of all active and executed contracts, Master Service Agreements (MSAs), Statements of Work (SOWs), and purchase orders between the University and any third-party vendors (including but not limited to Huron Consulting Group, EAB, or Noel-Levitz/RNL, Encoura, Risepoint (Academic Partnerships) specifically relating to 'financial aid optimization,' 'financial aid leveraging,' or 'financial aid offer letter design and communication strategies.' for the 2024-25, 2025-26, and 2026-27 academic years."

Please also include Vendor Disclosure Statement and any conflict-of-interest filings

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Meredith Kolodner
